_note: Own-site menu images (aylamelbourne.com dinner-menu, Sept 2025). Seeded the full DINNER menu (canonical) + Drinks from the express-lunch page (dinner menu carries no drinks; bar/cocktail menu is separate). Express-lunch food items skipped as duplicates at lunch prices.

items.name: Ayla Loaded Fries
items.description: Crispy fries with melted Mexican shredded cheese, salsa, tangy smashed avocado and drizzle of sour cream. (Add grilled chicken +$5)

items.name: Chatpatay (Noodle Snack)
items.description: Crispy instant noodles mixed with zesty Nepali spices, creating a crunchy and savory street-style snack

items.name: Soybean & Peanut Salad
items.description: Roasted soybeans and peanuts tossed with fresh onions, tomatoes, chilies, and herbs. Refreshing and healthy!

items.name: Chilli Chips
items.description: Crispy chips caramelized in sweet Nepali chili sauce with diced onions and capsicum.

items.name: Paneer Chilli
items.description: Fried Cottage cheese caramelised with nepali sweet chilli sauce and mix veggies.

items.name: Chips
items.description: Crispy fried chips with Aioli/chipotle mayo.

items.name: Mustang Timur Aalu
items.description: Spiced potato wedges tossed in Himalayan Sichuan pepper and aromatic herbs.

items.name: Mushroom Choila (Cold Salad)
items.description: Fried marinated cup mushroom mixed with blend of Himalayan spices, red onion, cilantro, spring onion.

items.name: Chicken Sausage
items.description: Perfectly fried chicken sausages served with authentic Nepali dipping sauces and Sriracha.

items.name: Crispy Fish
items.description: Lightly battered whitebait fish fried to golden perfection.

items.name: Chicken Lollipop
items.description: Crispy fried chicken drummettes served with a spicy house sauce.

items.name: Buffalo Sukuti (Jerky) Salad
items.description: Buffalo jerky tossed in spiced gravy with authentic Nepali herbs.

items.name: Pork Sekuwa (Chargrilled Pork)
items.description: Chargrilled pork belly marinated in bold Nepali spices.

items.name: Jhol Momo
items.description: Momo served in a spiced soup.

items.name: Goat Jhol Momo (Ayla's Popular)
items.description: Choice of Momo Served with Goat bone soup perfectly balanced with kick of sichuan pepper and broth.

items.name: Bhutan Dinner Set
items.description: Flavourful Goat tripe, lungs stir-fry served with beaten rice, soybean peanut salad, pickles, and green salad.

items.name: Pork Skewers (Chargrilled Pork) Dinner Set
items.description: Chargrilled pork sekuwa served with beaten rice, soybean peanut salad, pickles, and green salad.

items.name: Buffalo Sukuti (Jerky) Dinner Set
items.description: Buffalo jerky served with beaten rice soybean peanut salad, pickles, and green salad.

items.name: Chowmein (Nepalese Fried Noodles)
items.description: Stir-fried noodles with garlic, ginger, veggies, and spices.

items.name: Ayla Platter Set (Perfect for 2 to Share)
items.description: An exquisite spread with sausage sadheko (salad), Bhutan, pork skewers, buff Sukuti, crispy fish and green salads.

items.name: Nepali Fusion Tacos
items.description: A playful fusion of Nepali and Mexican flavors—mozzarella, salsa, jalapeno, and traditional sauces.

items.name: Dharanay Thukpa (Tibetan Noodle Soup)
items.description: Traditional noodle soup infused with bold spices and fresh herbs.

items.name: Curry Rice Bowl
items.description: Wok fried Basmati rice, mixed veggies, soysauce, cilantro, spring onion, chilli oil and blend of Nepalese spices.

items.name: Crispy Chicken Burger
items.description: Ayla special marinated and crumbled chicken patty, iceberg lettuce, jalapeño, chipotle mayo, aioli, tomato and side of chips.

items.name: Veg Burger
items.description: Veg patty, pickled cucumber, chipotle mayo, tomato, onion and side of chips.

items.name: Chicken Parma
items.description: Crumbled chicken schnitzel topped with Napoli sauce, Mexican shredded cheese, ham, side of chips and green salad.

items.name: Chicken Schnitzel
items.description: Crumbled chicken schnitzel with a side of chips and green salad. Choice of sauce: Aioli / Chipotle mayo

items.name: Fried Calamari
items.description: Fried calamari served with spicy mayonnaise.

items.name: Buffalo Wings (6 pcs)
items.description: Crumbled wings tossed with buffalo sauce and side of blue cheese.

items.name: Juju Dhau (King of Yoghurt)
items.description: A creamy traditional buffalo milk yoghurt delicately flavored with cardamom.

items.name: Lal Mohan & Yoghurt
items.description: Fried dough balls in sweet syrup paired with chilled yoghurt.

items.name: Chaku Ice Cream with Kitkat
items.description: A fusion dessert of Nepali chaku (molasses) ice cream topped with KitKat crumble.

items.name: Mango Lassi / Plain Lassi
items.description: Refreshing yogurt-based drinks.

items.name: Chiya (Nepalese Milk Tea)
items.description: Traditional sweet milk tea.

items.name: Soft Drink Cans
items.description: Assorted soft drinks.

items.name: Pot of House Beer
items.description: Refreshing draught beer.

items.name: Glass of House Wine (Red/White)
items.description: Classic house pour wine selection.
